changes_made.description: Replaced verbose original skill with concise, step-by-step format. Added decision tree: markitdown for binary formats, direct Python processing for CSV/JSON/XML. Shortened skill description.
changes_made.impact: html-to-md fixed from 0 to 100 (model now uses uvx markitdown). csv-to-md dropped from 92 to 85.

changes_made.description: Added CRITICAL warnings: never do mental math on CSV data, always use Python. Emphasized writing .py files instead of python3 -c one-liners.
changes_made.impact: No change in scores. Model does not load the skill for CSV tasks.

changes_made.description: Strengthened guidance to write .py script files. Added explicit step-by-step for CSV processing with write_file -> execute_command -> read_file verification pattern.
changes_made.impact: No change in scores. Model still uses python3 -c and falls back to mental math.

changes_made.description: Expanded skill description to include 'create reports from data files' and 'data reports and summaries' to better match CSV task prompts. Restructured skill content with stronger emphasis.
changes_made.impact: No change. Model consistently does not load skill for CSV tasks despite matching description.

analysis.html-to-md: Fully solved. The optimized skill's concise markitdown guidance enables the model to convert HTML reliably.
analysis.csv-to-md: Capped at 85/100 due to model behavior: qwen3-30b does not load the skill for CSV-to-report tasks, repeatedly tries python3 -c one-liners that fail on with-statement syntax, then falls back to mental arithmetic which produces wrong total inventory values. The 0.75 summary score (wrong total value) and 0.667 main-table score are consistent across all runs.
analysis.key_limitation: qwen3-30b on bare runtime does not reliably load skills for data processing tasks, limiting the skill's effectiveness for CSV scenarios.
